title: Emergency Resource Pooling
reasoning_excerpt:
Given the inability to coordinate and the high threshold required for effective regional response, committing full reserves carries significant risk if others do not contribute sufficiently. Retaining all reserves locally ensures a guaranteed baseline of protection for residents, which is the safest strategy amid uncertainty about other municipalities' actions. This approach prioritizes immediate, dependable safety over potential but uncertain regional benefits.

choice_label: Delay to next quarter (safe, learn from others)

Since all companies use the same AI advisor, they will independently reach the same conclusion, leading to identical actions. Delaying is safe regardless of competitors' choices and avoids launch-window chaos, offering a stable outcome even when all companies follow suit.
